name: Sun-Dried Cherry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Rich Brown Chicken or Lamb Stock
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop shallots and shiitake mushrooms.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add chopped shallots and shiitakes, sautéing until lightly browned.
4. Pour in the chicken or lamb stock, add orange zest, and wine.
5. Reduce liquid by half.
6. Stir in half of the sun-dried cherries, orange zest, juice, thyme, and port wine.
7. Reduce to a light sauce consistency.
8. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh sieve into a clean pan or bowl.
9. Add the remaining sun-dried cherries to the strained liquid.
10. Season with salt and black pepper as needed.
11. Keep warm until ready to serve.
